meaning: n.苍蝇,两翼昆虫,飞行vi.飞翔,飘扬,溃逃vt.飞越,使飘扬,逃脱adj.机敏的,敏捷的
examples: Magda was going to fly standby.
She is licensed to fly solo.
Former Leinster fly-half Contepomi missed with a penalty attempt in the final minute of the half.
To fly from one major hub airport to another today is, alas, barely tolerable.
